- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
      Project requirements clarified: Workspace supports both Python and Node.js development. Ready for project onboarding and avatar integration.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
      Starter HTML files, and Python/Node stubs created.

- [x] Customize the Project
      Added assistant.html, avatar.html, and CSS/JS to accommodate different avatar styles (Pixar, Cyberpunk, Steampunk, Anime).

- [x] Install Required Extensions
      No extensions needed at this time beyond what is available for HTML/Python/Node editing.

- [x] Compile the Project
      No compilation needed for static HTML. Python/Node files are simple 'Hello World' placeholders and contain no errors.

- [x] Create and Run Task
      Added `tasks.json` with a build task to "Open assistant.html in browser".

- [x] Launch the Project
      Project is fully launchable. User can start `assistant.html` through the provided VS Code task or directly.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
      README.md updated, and copilot-instructions.md cleaned of all HTML comments.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
